title: Synthesized Fix Plan
description: Holistic, cross-principle-aware implementation plan for a single source file. Each action has been cross-checked against all principles' metrics.

file.description: Path to the source file these actions target

actions.description: Ordered list of fix actions to implement. Respects depends_on ordering. Each action has been cross-checked against all principles.

suggestion_id.description: Generated ID for this action (e.g., holistic-fix-001)

principle.description: Primary principle this action addresses (e.g., OCP, LSP, SRP)

resolves.description: Finding IDs this action resolves — may span multiple principles

todo_items.description: Concrete implementation steps, each a single implementable action

suggested_fix.description: Full code snippets showing before/after: protocol definitions, extracted types, modified class, key methods

depends_on.description: Action IDs that must be implemented before this one

cross_check_results.description: Per-principle verification that this action does not introduce violations

principle.description: Principle checked against (e.g., SRP, OCP, LSP)

passed.description: True if the action does not violate this principle

detail.description: Explanation: what was checked and why it passed/failed

note.description: Explanation of design decisions, synergies between principles, or adjustments made

unresolved.description: Finding IDs that no action adequately resolves

reason.description: Why this finding remains unresolved (e.g., requires cross-module changes, fix would violate another principle)

conflicts_detected.description: Cross-principle conflicts found and how they were resolved

claimed_by.description: Principles or action IDs that claimed to resolve this finding

resolution.description: Which rule was applied and which approach won

relocation_detected.description: If applicable, describes how a fix relocated rather than eliminated the violation
